fingerprints.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

seo.title: Minnesota Dental Assistant License (2026) | Requirements & Fees
seo.description: Complete guide to dental assistant licensing in Minnesota — endorsement steps, fees, DANB certification, and radiography permits.
seo.keywords: dental assistant license minnesota, dental assistant certification minnesota, RDA minnesota, DANB CDA minnesota, dental assistant radiography minnesota

board.name: Minnesota Board of Dentistry
board.mailing_address: 2829 University Ave SE, Suite 450, Minneapolis, MN 55414-3249

license_types.title: Licensed Dental Assistant (LDA)
license_types.description: The primary credential for dental assistants in Minnesota.

steps.title: Complete Education and Required Examinations
steps.description: Graduate from a CODA-accredited dental assisting program or a Board-approved program. Pass the Dental Assisting National Board (DANB) Certified Dental Assistant (CDA) exam and an approved clinical examination (if applicable to your education pathway).

steps.title: Pass Minnesota Jurisprudence Exam
steps.description: Successfully complete the Minnesota Board of Dentistry jurisprudence examination. This exam may be administered online through the Minnesota Board of Dentistry's Applicant Portal or an approved external vendor.

steps.title: Create Applicant Portal Account & Initiate Application
steps.description: Access the Minnesota Board of Dentistry’s Applicant Portal and create a new account. Begin the online application for Licensed Dental Assistant (LDA) licensure, providing all required personal and professional information.

steps.title: Submit Supporting Documentation and Background Check
steps.description: Upload all necessary documents, such as official transcripts, DANB scores, and clinical exam results, directly through the Applicant Portal. Complete the required background check as instructed within the application process.

steps.title: Pay Application Fees
steps.description: Submit the required initial application and licensure fees through the Minnesota Board of Dentistry’s Applicant Portal to finalize your application submission.

documents.detail: Certificate from CODA-accredited program or documentation of on-the-job training hours.
Official CDA certification from the Dental Assisting National Board, if applicable.
Proof of radiography competency/certification required for taking x-rays.

provisional_text: Some states allow dental assistants to work under direct supervision while obtaining required certifications or completing training.
reciprocity_text: Dental assistants can apply for Licensed Dental Assistant (LDA) through the Minnesota Board of Dentistry by license.

faqs.question: Does Minnesota require a dental assistant license?
faqs.answer: Yes, Minnesota requires Licensed Dental Assistant (LDA) through the state board.

faqs.question: Is DANB certification recognized in Minnesota?
faqs.answer: Yes, DANB CDA certification is recognized and often preferred by employers in Minnesota.

faqs.question: Can I take dental x-rays in Minnesota?
faqs.answer: Yes, but a radiography permit or certification is required.

faqs.question: How much does it cost to become a dental assistant in Minnesota?
faqs.answer: State application fees are $100. Additional costs may include DANB CDA exam ($450), radiography certification, and background check fees.

reciprocity.notes: Dental assistants can apply for Licensed Dental Assistant (LDA) through the Minnesota Board of Dentistry by license.

hero.title: Become a Dental Assistant in Minnesota
hero.dek: To apply for an initial Licensed Dental Assistant (LDA) license in Minnesota, applicants must create an account and submit their application through the Minnesota Board of Dentistry’s Applicant Portal.

official_links.portal_name: Minnesota Board of Dentistry’s Applicant Portal
official_links.registration_steps: New applicants will create an account with a unique username and password. After account creation, applicants can log in to complete and submit the online application for licensure.
